issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error scenarios or edge cases for missing user inputs.
The skill contains verbose sections that could be trimmed for brevity.

scenarios.name: Senior backend payments engineer JD
scenarios.rationale: Baseline produces a competent JD with Required/Nice-to-Have split but often blows past 6 required items and uses passive voice; treatment follows the skill's 4-6 required cap, you-language, and EEO statement.

scenarios.name: Rewrite developer JD for inclusivity
scenarios.rationale: Baseline DEI advice is reasonably strong (removes 'rockstar', softens degree), but rarely cites the 60-vs-100% requirements gap or restructures the required list aggressively; treatment applies the full set of inclusivity fixes from the skill.
